data.body: AC amendment: Error and cleanup paths. (a) Pattern extraction artifacts stored in ARTIFACTS_DIR/huge/ namespace — cleaned on error or fallback routing. (b) On DIFF_HASH drift at Step 5 (code changed between Step 0 and Step 5), emit HUGE_REVIEW_HASH_DRIFT signal and instruct caller to re-run from REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 2 to recompute the hash. (c) Step 1 INSUFFICIENT_FILES path must clean any partially written artifacts before returning.
